overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing the protagonist walking through the town of Rhodes during golden hour. The character passes wooden wagons, the Bank of Rhodes building, and various NPCs while traveling along a dusty dirt road lined with traditional Western wooden architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: wagon camp on town outskirts with scattered wooden structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dusty wagon camp area with wooden warehouses and parked wagons on either side

notable_agents.action: child walking ahead on the dirt path toward the water tower
dog running across the path from right to left in front of the character

entered.detail: tall wooden water tower with RHODES painted on the side, visible against the blue sky
large wooden barn-like structure with a wagon parked beside it
wooden wagon with canvas cover parked on the grass beside the road
mature tree with dense green canopy providing shade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dusty wagon camp on the outskirts of Rhodes. The character walks forward past wooden warehouses and parked covered wagons, following a child NPC toward a tall water tower visible in the distance. A dog runs across the path from right to left as the camera moves through the warm golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: open field approaching town with scattered wagons and distant farmhouse

events.description: moving past the dense wagon camp into more open area with view of distant white house on hill

agents.ego_description: walking past the last of the parked wagons with a white farmhouse now visible on the hillside to the left

notable_agents.action: man in straw hat standing near the wagons watching the character pass by

entered.detail: white two-story house sitting on a grassy hill in the distance
large tree with spreading branches casting shadows over the dirt road

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the wagon camp into a more open area where a white farmhouse becomes visible on a distant hill to the left. A man in a straw hat stands near the remaining wagons as the character passes under a large shade tree, transitioning from the commercial wagon area toward the residential part of town.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street of western town with bank building and wooden sidewalks

events.description: character increases speed to a jog while proceeding down the main road
two riders on horseback pass by from right to left, overtaking the character

agents.ego_description: jogging down the main dirt road toward the town center, passing the Bank of Rhodes on the left

notable_agents.action: rider on white horse galloping past from right to left on the road
second rider on brown horse following closely behind the first rider

entered.detail: brick building with ornate painted sign reading BANK OF RHODES on the side
raised wooden plank walkway running alongside the dirt road

segments.scene_description: The character picks up speed jogging down the main street of Rhodes as the Bank of Rhodes building comes into view on the left. Two riders on horseback gallop past from right to left, kicking up dust on the dirt road. The scene features wooden sidewalks and the water tower visible again in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential back street with wooden shacks and outhouses

events.description: passing the bank building into a narrower residential area with smaller wooden structures

agents.ego_description: walking past wooden shacks and an outhouse in the quieter residential part of town

entered.detail: small wooden shed with slanted roof beside the road
small weathered wooden cabin with a small porch
simple wooden bench sitting beside the dirt path

segments.scene_description: Having passed the Bank of Rhodes, the character enters a narrower residential back street lined with small wooden shacks and an outhouse. The area is quieter with fewer NPCs, featuring simple wooden structures and a bench beside the continuing dirt road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dusty commercial wagon camp into the heart of Rhodes, eventually settling into a quiet residential back street. It begins by moving past wooden warehouses and covered wagons in the warm golden hour light, following a child toward a distant water tower as a dog darts across the path. As the camera leaves the camp, the scene opens up to reveal a white farmhouse on a distant hill and a man in a straw hat standing beneath a large shade tree. The movement then accelerates into a jog down the main street, passing the Bank of Rhodes while riders on horseback gallop past and kick up dust along the wooden sidewalks. Finally, the path shifts away from the bustle of the main road, turning into a narrower residential lane lined with simple wooden shacks and an outhouse.
